rationale.R1.1: The artifact has a minor issue with conceptual reconstruction as it discusses multiple methods and their limitations without clearly framing the main contribution.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact has an argument-chain issue, particularly in discussing the limitations of PPO commitment weight and CMDP learning rate tuning without providing clear evidence or logical flow.
